description: Multi-species active-site alignment visualization showing key motif conservation in RvY_17310
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive multi-species alignment of the key active-site region
# Using the known alignments from BLAST and manual alignment

# Key region around Cu-binding His-x-His and adjacent residues
# Human SOD1 (P00441) positions 42-70 (UniProt numbering)

# Extracted active-site regions (manually aligned from known structures)
# Format: species, accession, region1 (around His-x-His, ~pos 43-55), region2 (around His64-72)
# Human SOD1: GLHGFHVHEFGDNTAGC...PHFNPLSRKH...EERHVGDLGN...HCIIGRTLVVHEKADDLGKGG...RLACGVIGIA
# RvY_17310:  GDHGIHIHSFGDLSRGCE...PHFNPEGNHH...YQAHAGDLGN...TLVVGRTLVIHEKPDDLGRGG...RLACGIIGVS

# Build an alignment display for the key motif regions
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(18, 10))
ax.axis('off')

# Title
ax.text(0.5, 0.98, 'Active-Site Sequence Conservation: RvY_17310 vs Characterized Cu/Zn-SODs', 
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', ha='center', va='top')
ax.text(0.5, 0.95, 'Key metal-binding motifs from domain-extracted alignments', 
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, ha='center', va='top', color='gray')

# Define the three key motif regions to display
# Region A: Cu-binding His-x-His (human ~44-56)
# Region B: PHFN motif + Zn-binding (human ~64-84)  
# Region C: Cu-binding His120 + ESL (human ~118-147)

regions = {
    'Region A: Cu-binding motif': {
        'Human SOD1':   'GLHGFHVHEFGDNTAGC',
        'Bovine SOD1':  'GDHGFHVHQFGDNTQGC',
        'Drosophila':   'GLHGFHVHEFGDNTNGC',
        'RvY_17310':    'GDHGIHIHSFGDLSRGCE',
        'RvY_13070*':   'GDHGIVINSFGDLTTGCQ',  # 9/10 - His49->Val
    },
    'Region B: Zn-binding + PHFN': {
        'Human SOD1':   'PHFNPLSRKHGGPKDEERHVGDLGN',
        'Bovine SOD1':  'PHFNPLSKKHGGPKDEERHVGDLGN',
        'Drosophila':   'PHFNPYGKEHGAPVDENRHLGDLGN',
        'RvY_17310':    'PHFNPEGNHHGSPDDVQYQAHAGDLGN',
        'RvY_13070*':   'PHFNKQGGQHGEPDDQRYQAHASDLGN',
    },
    'Region C: ESL + C-terminus': {
        'Human SOD1':   'RTLVVHEKADDLGKGGNEESTKTGNAGSRLACGVIGIAQ',
        'Bovine SOD1':  'RTMVVHEKPDDLGRGGNEESTKTGNAGSRLACGVIGIAK',
        'Drosophila':   'RTVVVHADADDLGQGGHELSKSTGNAGARIGCGVIGIAKV',
        'RvY_17310':    'RTLVIHEKPDDLGRGGDQTSRETGNSGARLACGIIGVSH-',
        'RvY_13070*':   'RTLVVHEKPDDLGRGGEQESRETGNSGARLACGIIGISK-',
    },
}

# Color scheme for residues
def get_color(aa, is_key_pos):
    if is_key_pos:
        return '#FF4444'  # red for key positions
    elif aa == 'H':
        return '#4488FF'  # blue for histidine
    elif aa == 'D' or aa == 'E':
        return '#FF8844'  # orange for acidic
    elif aa == 'K' or aa == 'R':
        return '#44BB44'  # green for basic
    elif aa == 'C':
        return '#FFDD44'  # yellow for cysteine
    else:
        return '#CCCCCC'  # gray for others

y = 0.88
fontsize = 10
monospace = 'monospace'

for region_name, seqs in regions.items():
    ax.text(0.02, y, region_name, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', va='top')
    y -= 0.03
    
    for species, seq in seqs.items():
        # Species label
        style = 'italic' if '*' not in species else 'normal'
        color = 'red' if species == 'RvY_17310' else 'black'
        weight = 'bold' if species == 'RvY_17310' else 'normal'
        
        ax.text(0.02, y, f'{species:>16s}  ', transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=fontsize,
                fontfamily=monospace, va='top', color=color, fontweight=weight)
        
        # Sequence with colored residues
        x_start = 0.18
        for i, aa in enumerate(seq):
            # Determine if this is a key position (His, Cys, Asp at binding sites)
            is_key = False
            if species == 'RvY_17310':
                is_key = aa in 'HCDR' and aa != '-'  # Highlight key residue types
            
            bg_color = 'white'
            if aa == 'H':
                bg_color = '#CCE5FF'
            elif aa == 'C':
                bg_color = '#FFFFCC'
            elif aa in 'DE':
                bg_color = '#FFE5CC'
            elif aa in 'KR':
                bg_color = '#CCFFCC'
            
            txt_color = 'red' if species == 'RvY_17310' and aa == 'H' else 'black'
            
            ax.text(x_start + i * 0.017, y, aa, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=fontsize-1,
                    fontfamily=monospace, va='top', color=txt_color, fontweight='bold' if aa in 'HCDR' else 'normal',
                    bbox=dict(boxstyle='square,pad=0.1', facecolor=bg_color, edgecolor='none') if aa != '-' else {})
        
        y -= 0.028
    
    y -= 0.015

# Legend
y -= 0.01
legend_items = [
    ('His (H)', '#CCE5FF', '#4488FF'),
    ('Cys (C)', '#FFFFCC', '#BBBB00'),
    ('Asp/Glu (D/E)', '#FFE5CC', '#FF8844'),
    ('Lys/Arg (K/R)', '#CCFFCC', '#44BB44'),
]
ax.text(0.02, y, 'Legend:', transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', va='top')
y -= 0.025
for label, bg, fg in legend_items:
    ax.text(0.04, y, '  ', transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, fontfamily=monospace, va='top',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='square,pad=0.15', facecolor=bg, edgecolor='gray'))
    ax.text(0.07, y, label, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, va='top')
    y -= 0.025

ax.text(0.02, y-0.01, '* RvY_13070 has His49→Val substitution at Cu-binding site (9/10 residues conserved)',
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, va='top', color='gray', style='italic')
ax.text(0.02, y-0.035, 'RvY_17310 (TARGET): All metal-binding His, Asp, Cys, and Arg residues are conserved',
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, va='top', color='red', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('alignment_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: alignment_comparison.png")
